# dotnet-version-upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading SimpleWebApp from net8.0 to net9.0 using the All-at-Once strategy. Consolidating Program.cs and Startup.cs into the minimal hosting model and removing the legacy Startup class.

**Progress**: 1/1 tasks complete (100%) ![100%](https://progress-bar.xyz/100)

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-upgrade-simplewebapp: Upgrade SimpleWebApp to net9.0 with minimal hosting model
